name: WASM
summary: WebAssembly. Binary format cho browser và server (WASI). Near-native speed. Rust/C/Go compile to WASM.

facts.text: sandbox: không direct syscall, memory safe
WASI: WASM System Interface — serverside WASM
~70-80% của native speed — much faster than JS

danger: không thể access DOM trực tiếp — cần JS glue code
